<?php /** * Mockery (https://docs.mockery.io/) * * @copyright https://github.com/mockery/mockery/blob/HEAD/COPYRIGHT.md * @license https://github.com/mockery/mockery/blob/HEAD/LICENSE BSD 3-Clause License * @link https://github.com/mockery/mockery for the canonical source repository */ namespace Mockery; interface ExpectationInterface { /** * @template TArgs * * @param TArgs ...$args * * @return self */ public function andReturn(...$args); /** * @return self */ public function andReturns(); /** * @return LegacyMockInterface|MockInterface */ public function getMock(); /** * @return int */ public function getOrderNumber(); }
